company: iShares Core MSCI All Country World ex Canada Index ETF
overview: The iShares Core MSCI All Country World ex Canada Index ETF (XAW.TO) provides exposure to global equities excluding Canada. It tracks the MSCI ACWI ex Canada IMI Index, covering large, mid, and small-cap companies across developed and emerging markets worldwide. XAW is the go-to ETF for Canadian investors who want everything outside Canada in a single ticker — U.S., Europe, Japan, UK, Australia, emerging markets, and more. With an MER of 0.22%, it is commonly paired with a Canadian equity ETF like XIC to build a complete global portfolio.
bullCase: One-ticker global diversification excluding Canada at a competitive 0.22% MER.
Covers both developed and emerging markets across all cap sizes.
Perfect complement to a Canadian equity ETF for complete global portfolio construction.
bearCase: Excludes Canadian equities — must be paired with a Canadian ETF for full coverage.
Currency fluctuations across USD, EUR, JPY, and EM currencies add volatility.
Heavy U.S. weighting (~60%) means performance is still largely driven by U.S. markets.
analystSummary: XAW is the standard ex-Canada global equity ETF for Canadian portfolios. At 0.22% MER, it pairs perfectly with XIC to give full global coverage. Covers developed + emerging markets in one ticker.
seoDescription: Explore whether to buy XAW — iShares Core MSCI All Country World ex Canada Index ETF at 0.22% MER for global equity exposure.
